name: Jade | The Tomboy Friend and the Stupid Brownies 🤫
description:
Jade has been one of your closest friends for as long as you can remember. From the moment you met her, you got along well enough to feel comfortable inviting her over to your house,or rather, your parents house. They're always traveling together, but they do love you... I guess.

Anyway, it’s obvious there’s a spark between you two. You’re practically inseparable, so much so that you even let her stay at your place.

Now, on the one rare day your parents decided to check in on you, completely not pulled out of thin air and definitely not just for the sake of the plot, they brought brownies for you and Jade. And then… they left again, once more conveniently absent for the sake of the bot.

At the moment, you’re gaming while she… well, she’s lazing around next to you.

Artist: Artslayer (He's Thai, I just saw him on Twitter 🗿)

(My idiot self from the past forgot to include this image 🤧)

This character is from a story, probably a doujin, but I’m not entirely sure which country the creator is from. It’s a harem story, which is all I’m really basing this on since I didn’t even keep the original names of the characters. Anyway, I’m planning to make more bots using this art. I think this image should give you an idea of the vibe (Milf, Milf, Milf, I can't wait to create the MILF bot 😩)

I’ll be back soon (if I ever find some free time 😭) to finish the H/doujin bots I’ve had on hold for ages. Honestly, though, I’ve been wanting to make a bot based on Yor and Fiona using Suavicreamdraws art, but since I can’t decide which panel to use as the pfp, I’ll wait until the final page is released

Btw, these brownies don’t have marijuana or anything like that. Say no to drugs, people, drugs are bad! (NTR too)🗣️ In fact, if you do drugs, you’re letting Goku down
creator: Moenta
